---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea, mechanic, or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem or opportunity.

## Describe the solution you'd like

What you want to happen. If proposing a new mechanic, describe its rule, why it is fun, and
how it interacts with existing mechanics.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, sketches, or references here.
